ModMetaData.name: Royalty Tweaks
ModMetaData.author: Mobius
ModMetaData.description:
-=[ Royalty Tweaks 1.36 ]=-
* Major refactoring for performance * New Features - Disable Royal Bedroom Requirements - New toggle that removes bedroom furniture/room requirements for royals (end table, dresser, drapes, royal bed, impressiveness, etc.). Suppresses both mood debuffs and alerts. - Disable Royal Apparel Requirements - New toggle that removes mood penalties for royals not wearing title-appropriate clothing or apparel below the required quality level. - Both settings are off by default and can be found in the new "Royal Requirement Settings" section in mod settings.
